zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Grey於1412年出生在英國賀福爾洛--也時，她的父親Richard Grey19歲，母親Blanche de la Vache15歲。她於1425年與John De Burley V在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年4月4日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice de Grey于1412年出生在英国賀福爾洛--也时，她的父亲Richard Grey19岁，母亲Blanche de la Vache15岁。她于1425年与John De Burley V在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年4月4日在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Grey was born in 1412, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, her father, Richard Grey, was 19 and her mother, Blanche de la Vache, was 15. She married John De Burley V in 1425, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died on 4 April 1474, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Grey est née en 1412, à Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Grey, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Blanche de la Vache, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John De Burley V en 1425, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 avril 1474, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice de Grey 1412 in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Grey 19 und ihre Mutter Blanche de la Vache 15. Sie hat 1425 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom John De Burley V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. April 1474 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Grey è nata il nel 1412 nel Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Grey, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Blanche de la Vache, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John De Burley V nel 1425, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 aprile 1474, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Greyが1412年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアロス-オン-ウイで生まれた時，父Richard Greyは19歳，母Blanche de la Vacheは15歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチでJohn De Burley Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年4月4日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで62歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Grey(이)가 1412년 영국 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Grey(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche de la Vache(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 John De Burley V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, England: Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Grey nasceu em 1412, em Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Grey, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de la Vache, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Burley V em 1425, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de abril de 1474, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, England: Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Grey родилась в 1412 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Grey было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de la Vache, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Burley V в 1425 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 4 апреля 1474 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.

es.Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, England: Acton Trussell, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice de Grey nació en 1412, en Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Grey, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Blanche de la Vache, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John De Burley V en 1425, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de abril de 1474, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
